notes: Self-contained file formalising Silverman III.2.3.1: the negation involution on the coordinate ring and its fixed-point characterisation (fixed iff in F[X]). No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides. None of the 13 declarations are referenced by any other file in the project (negInvolution_involutive and negInvolution_eq_iff are the main intended exports but have no callers yet), making the entire file a dead-code candidate unless imported. The supporting lemmas from mathlib (smul_basis_eq_zero, exists_smul_basis_eq) live in Mathlib.AlgebraicGeometry.EllipticCurve.Affine.Point.
